repository.name: type-ahead
repository.description: VS Code extension for inline code autocomplete — works with Ollama, Anthropic (Claude), vLLM, LM Studio, LiteLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible LLM server.

commit.message:
feat: LiteLLM Anthropic response format + thinking block stripping

LiteLLM Anthropic format support:
- New setting typeAhead.litellmAnthropicResponse (boolean, default false)
- When enabled, sends Anthropic-format request (system as top-level param,
  stop_sequences instead of stop, no system role in messages)
- Parses Anthropic response format (content[0].text)
- Same URL and Bearer auth as standard LiteLLM

Thinking/reasoning block stripping:
- Strips <think>...</think> and <reasoning>...</reasoning> blocks
- Strips [SYSTEM]...[/SYSTEM] blocks and standalone tags
- Strips leading prose reasoning before code starts
- Fixes ghost text showing model chain-of-thought instead of code

223 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add sparks, brushing phase, 30° rod angle, quality feedback, weld preview

- WeldCanvas: rod now tilts 30° from vertical (natural welding angle)
- WeldCanvas: grip handle 3× longer (126px) with 10 knurl ridges
- WeldCanvas: animated spark particles burst from tip while welding
- WeldCanvas: real-time quality ring around weld pool (green=good, red=bad)
- WeldCanvas: weld pool scales with quality (bigger/brighter when technique is correct)
- BrushingCanvas: new wire-brush mini-game after completing a weld
  - Swipe brush along bead to remove slag (85% coverage unlocks report)
  - Slag crust layer flakes away as brush passes
- [levelId]: brushing phase between welding and report
- [levelId]: real-time GOOD/ARC!/SPEED! quality badge overlay during weld
- ReportCard: weld preview shows the actual bead you deposited, scaled to fit
- WeldCanvas: accepts staticBeads + polished props for preview rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

追加: Phase 7B 年次管理の整備（決算年月紐付け・ARIMA重複防止）

- db_operations.py: load_arima_forecastsにdataset_idカラム追加、delete_arima_forecast追加
- page_arima.py: 決算年月表示、同一決算年月・変数の重複確認ダイアログ、保存済み一覧（削除ボタン付き）
- page_model_confirm.py: 決算年月をhyperparametersに記録・表示、保存済みモデル一覧のID列を決算年月列に変更

SPEC-003 documenta retroactivamente las recomendaciones de RES-002
(análisis comparativo con Aline.co, Harvey, etc.) como contrato de
validación. Marca lo implementado (~85%) vs pendiente (testimonios,
precios, video). Actualiza CLAUDE.md y ROADMAP.md con referencias.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Standardise license setup: MPL-2.0 + PMPL-1.0-or-later (REUSE)

- LICENSE: pure MPL-2.0 text for machine detection (GitHub, registries)
- LICENSES/MPL-2.0.txt: standard MPL-2.0 text
- LICENSES/PMPL-1.0-or-later.txt: Palimpsest License text
- NOTICE: explains the dual-license relationship
- Source SPDX headers remain PMPL-1.0-or-later

This ensures OSI compliance checks pass while preserving PMPL as
the governing license for source code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

This fix moves the contents of apps/backend/ to the parent directory after copy.

fix: 구버전 조합장용 샘플 리포트 링크 제거 및 SEO 차단

- ReportSamplesSection: '전체 샘플 리포트 보기' 링크 제거
  (모달 미리보기로 충분, /sample-report는 B2B 조합장용 구버전)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix rod geometry and grip for better ergonomics

- Fixed rod to constant 80px length (no longer varies with arc length)
- Made grip taller and portrait-oriented (28x42) with knurl ridges for better hold feel
- Clamped visual rod tip at jointY-2 so rod never draws through metal plates
- Arc spark line now goes from clamped visual tip to joint surface
- Fixed arc formula: finger BELOW joint controls arc gap (e.y - jointY - 10) / 100

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix data persistence by writing to localStorage synchronously

The debounced Firestore write could lose data on tab close since
the async write might not complete before the page is killed.
Now writes to localStorage instantly as a backup, with Firestore
still syncing on a debounce for cross-device access.

perf: comprehensive performance improvements and UI updates

- Move KaTeX CSS from global layout to post pages only
- Fix rehype plugin order so minification runs last
- Add sitemap.ts and robots.ts for SEO
- Add dynamicParams=false to catch-all routes for instant 404s
- Add suppressHydrationWarning to fix dark mode FOUC

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add agent team: Mechanics, Design, Ideator + Fault Line game

## Agent Team
- Game Mechanics Agent: LLM auditor + deterministic battle balance fixer
- Design Agent: brand consistency enforcer for React components
- Game Ideator Agent: creative concept generator (concept, bulk, remix, unit, trending)
- /api/agents/* router exposing all 11 agent endpoints

## AI Compiler Improvements
- Fix answer distribution B/C bias: per-question position instructions + post-generation shuffle + distribution validator
- Battle HP scaling: max(60, question_count * 8) instead of hardcoded 100
- Speed threshold raised to 15s (was 5s — impossible for educational content)
- Player damage raised to 20 (was 10 — too forgiving)
- Mechanics agent runs automatically in compilation pipeline

## EnhancedBattleRuntime Fixes
- Phase-aware taunts: taunt_messages_low_hp used below 30% HP
- Speed bonus threshold floor: Math.max(8, raw || 15)
- Enemy HP: prefers spec value, falls back to scaled formula

## EnhancedAdventureRuntime Fixes
- Crash guard: safeQuestionIndex clamp prevents out-of-bounds
- Infinite retry loop fix: advance after 2 wrong attempts
- Accuracy denominator: uses questionsAttempted not questions.length
- Click-to-skip typewriter animation on NPC dialogue

## Fault Line — Ideator's Top Pick
- Full 15-question battle GameSpec: logical fallacies as geological monsters
- The Sophist Colossus boss with phase-aware taunts
- POST /api/agents/ideator/create-demo endpoint (no LLM wait)
- "Ideator's Pick" card in StudioNew sidebar with one-click creation
- seed_fault_line.py for direct DB seeding when MONGO_URL is available

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 전체 페이지 콘텐츠 불일치 및 위계 오류 수정

- LandingLeadForm: '최대 40% 할인' → '최대 34%' (실제 할인율 기준)
- payment/success: '30분 이상 미수신' → '10분 이상' ('5분 이내 발송'과 기준 통일)
- login: '무료 분담금 분석' → '분담금 분석' (유료 리포트 서비스와 메시지 충돌 제거)
- page.js features: '조합장/시행사용 사업성 분석 엔진' → B2C 조합원 중심 문구로 교정
- page.js features: h3에 이모지 직접 포함 → iconWrapper + cardTitle 클래스로 분리
- ReportSamplesSection: isBetaMode() 적용 — '베타 가격 적용 중' 고정 문구 제거
  → 베타: '사전 신청가' / 정식: '출시 특가' 자동 분기
- sample-report: metadata 추가 + CTA 링크 삽입 (고아 페이지 해소)
- ReportSamplesSection: '전체 샘플 리포트 보기 →' 링크 추가

commit.message:
fix: increase MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS from 5 to 10 for multi-step tasks

5 tool rounds was too few for coding tasks that need explore → read →
search → edit → verify → edit again. Claude's response was getting
cut off mid-task when it ran out of rounds.

fix: increase Claude max_tokens to 16384 to prevent truncated responses

8192 tokens was too low for a coding agent doing multiple tool rounds
of reading, editing, and summarizing. Responses were getting cut off
mid-sentence.
